opportunities.specific_product: 100% Turkish cotton luxury bath towel set
opportunities.transformation_hook: Scratchy $8 towels → spa-soft Turkish cotton for $42 total
opportunities.before_state: Rough, pilling discount-store towels that get scratchier and thinner with every wash
opportunities.after_state: Hotel-plush Turkish cotton towels stacked neatly in a transformed bathroom, softer every wash
buyer_intent_keywords: towels that get softer after washing
opportunities.why_now: A BIFL Reddit thread asking specifically about towels that soften over time went active today with 168 comments, signaling a large cohort in active purchase-research mode.

opportunities.specific_product: Mamma Mia waterproof stretch sofa cover
opportunities.transformation_hook: Pet-destroyed couch → showroom-fresh in 5 min for $47
opportunities.before_state: Shredded, pet-hair-matted couch that is embarrassing when summer guests arrive
opportunities.after_state: Clean, fitted sofa that looks brand-new, repels future pet hair, and survives spills
buyer_intent_keywords: sofa cover that stays in place
opportunities.why_now: Post-Memorial-Day entertaining season is peak for furniture-refresh purchases and Mamma Mia's 24-30% commission makes this the single highest-margin Reel opportunity in the catalog.

opportunities.specific_product: Waterdrop countertop reverse osmosis water filter
opportunities.transformation_hook: Quoted $10K for water filtration? Get clean water for $89
opportunities.before_state: Family anxious about tap water quality after a plumber quoted $10K for a whole-house system
opportunities.after_state: Crystal-clear filtered water on the counter with zero installation, zero plumber, zero $10K bill
opportunities.why_now: A HomeImprovement post about a shocking $10K whole-house water quote is driving 329 comments today as homeowners urgently search for budget alternatives.

opportunities.transformation_hook: Wake up pain-free every morning — $65 pillow that changes everything
opportunities.before_state: Flat, yellowed pillows causing chronic neck pain and a bedroom that looks tired and unloved
opportunities.after_state: Supportive, adjustable pillow on a Pinterest-worthy bed that eliminates morning neck stiffness
opportunities.why_now: HGTV's Pinterest push on timeless bedroom pieces and a viral HomeDecorating daughter's-room post are actively priming the bedroom-refresh purchase window this week.

opportunities.specific_product: outdoor solar bug zapper or mosquito repellent lantern
opportunities.transformation_hook: Abandoned buggy patio → mosquito-free outdoor room for $35
opportunities.before_state: Patio left empty every evening because mosquitoes make it unusable and a screened porch is unaffordable
opportunities.after_state: Relaxed summer evenings outside with candles, drinks, and zero mosquito interruptions
buyer_intent_keywords: how to keep mosquitoes off porch
opportunities.why_now: A HomeImprovement thread asking for mosquito-free patio solutions generated 78 comments in late May, the exact start of peak outdoor-living season when purchase urgency is highest.
